description: Enhance mobile UI smoothness with premium animations, transitions, and micro-interactions. Make the app feel buttery smooth like a native iOS/Android app. Add haptic-like feedback, smoother page transitions, and polished micro-interactions throughout the customer-facing pages.
steps: Enhance components/mobile-bottom-nav.tsx: Add a subtle spring animation when switching tabs (the active indicator should animate between positions using framer-motion layoutId). Add a scale-down + bounce-back animation on tap using whileTap={{ scale: 0.85 }} with spring physics. The cart badge count should animate with a pop effect when changing.

Enhance the home page recent orders section (components/home/recent-orders-section.tsx): Add staggered fade-in-up animations for each order card using framer-motion variants with staggerChildren. Add a subtle parallax scroll effect on the horizontal scroll cards.

Add a new component components/ui/haptic-button.tsx: A button wrapper that provides iOS-like press feedback - scales to 0.95 on press with a fast spring, has a subtle shadow reduction on press, and optionally triggers navigator.vibrate(10) on supported devices for haptic feedback.

Enhance the customer orders client (components/dashboard/customer-orders-client.tsx): Make the expand/collapse animation smoother by adding overflow-hidden during animation and using framer-motion layout animations. The status timeline steps should animate in with a staggered delay when expanded. Add a subtle pulse animation to the active status step.

Add smooth scroll-linked animations to the header: When scrolling down, the mobile header should shrink slightly (height reduces from 56px to 48px) with a smooth transition. The header background opacity should increase as user scrolls. Use a scroll event listener with requestAnimationFrame for performance.

Create components/ui/animated-page-wrapper.tsx: A wrapper component that provides consistent page enter/exit animations across all customer pages. Uses framer-motion with a slide-up + fade-in on enter (y: 20 to 0, opacity 0 to 1) with spring physics (stiffness: 260, damping: 25). Export and use in key pages like dashboard, cart, account.
acceptance_criteria: Bottom nav tab switching has a visible smooth animation (active indicator moves with spring physics)
Order cards on the home page fade in with staggered timing
Interactive buttons have visible press feedback (scale down on touch)
The mobile header responds to scroll with a shrink/opacity change
Page content animates in smoothly on navigation
No jank or frame drops during animations (using will-change and GPU-accelerated properties)
verification: Run npx next build to verify no TypeScript or build errors
Verify new component files exist: components/ui/haptic-button.tsx, components/ui/animated-page-wrapper.tsx
findings: All animations compile and build successfully. Used framer-motion layoutId for bottom nav tab indicator animation, spring physics for expand/collapse, staggered variants for timeline and order cards, and requestAnimationFrame-throttled scroll listener for header shrink. No jank expected since all animations use GPU-accelerated properties (transform, opacity) with will-change hints.
